summary: Full E2E testing of ATMAN admin panel (JWT auth + dynamic settings/videos). Backend: 14/14 pytest passed. Frontend: admin login, invalid-cred error, dashboard tabs (Settings/Videos/Inquiries), input focus retention on Contact tab (verified — no focus loss on rapid typing), settings save+persist, video add, logout, and protected-route redirect all work. Public site reflects saved settings (phone/location) and shows footer admin link.

issues: Two 404 console errors seen when videos panel loads (likely YouTube thumbnail hotlink for test youtube_ids or missing image asset). Non-blocking.

action_items: Optional: investigate the 2x 404 network errors on the Videos admin panel (likely thumbnail fetch for invalid youtube_ids). Cosmetic.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py PUT /admin/videos/{id}: constructs Video from merged dict but uses old id/created_at — correct. OK.
seed_admin correctly idempotent and updates password hash when env changes.
JWT uses HS256 with 7-day expiry from env JWT_SECRET — good. Consider adding rate limiting/brute-force lockout on /admin/login (currently none).

CORS uses allow_credentials=True with allow_origins='*' fallback — browsers reject credentialed requests with wildcard. Frontend uses Bearer header (not cookies) so it works, but the config is misleading; set explicit CORS_ORIGINS in env.
seed_data_creation: Created + deleted a TEST_ video via API; created 1 TEST booking inquiry via API (persists in admin/bookings list). Restored settings after modification. One extra video 'UI Test Video' (youtube_id UITEST123) was added via UI and left in DB — main agent may remove if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend admin auth uses Bearer token stored in localStorage['atman_admin_token']. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py cover admin auth, settings CRUD w/ persistence, video CRUD w/ persistence, booking POST + admin list. Admin dashboard input focus retention was specifically verified per prior 'Field moved to module scope' fix — works correctly.
